title: Eva on a greek magazine
wikitext:
[]: Eva on a greek magazine             Quote Post by the_seventh_child » Wed Mar 23, 2005 4:34 am On a montly magazine about various topics,there was a three page interview about Evangelion and it was rated very well i can say.. I'm glad that even 7 years after its original release it found its way to greece..Isn't it amazing how can still Eva fascinates people?
